yogurt-dessert-with-cookies-in-5-minutes.name: Yogurt Dessert With Cookies In 5 Minutes

ingredients.item: 2 biscuits of your liking (simple or stuffed)
2 biscuits of your liking (simple or stuffed)

instructions: Beat the cold cream first in thick form with wire or hand mixer.
Add the yogurt, milk caramel, 1 pinch of salt and gently mix with spatula.
Break cookies into pieces small in the mixture.
Gently mix to get wet.
It's time we add the caramelized almonds.
Mix gently.
We'll use a pickle, a detachable base or a fireproof vessel.
We're touching the wheel ring on a tray or a platter.
Empty and press with the spoon without any gaps.
We're straightening the surface.
Freeze in the freezer to serve or freeze for a few hours to stabilise and cut into pieces.
Carefully disembowel the derrick with the help of a knife that we're passing around in the derrick to unscrew.
Cut into pieces and serve.
Pour with milk caramel or melted chocolate.
Garnish with caramelized nuts.

yogurt-sauce-argiro.name: Yogurt Sauce

ingredients.item: 1/2 cup of low fat drained yogurt
1/2 cup of low fat drained yogurt

instructions: In a bowl, add the yogurt, mustard, olive oil, lemon, vinegar, honey, salt, pepper and garlic.
Mix all the ingredients with the wire to homogenize.
Check the salt and pepper and if necessary add extra.
Try and correct the acidity in lemon, vinegar and salt and pepper after mixing all the ingredients together.
You can use it immediately or keep it in the refrigerator well covered in a glass vessel.
